section.h1:
Register Your Shipment
With One Form
section.p: سجّل شحنتك بسهولة وتابع حالة طلبك
Submit your import or export shipment details. Our customs team will review and respond within 1–2 business days.

div.p: Fill in shipment details and available documents. Takes less than 5 minutes.
Our customs team verifies all information and checks Saudi regulatory requirements.
Receive email confirmation. A clearance order is created and you are notified immediately.

textarea.placeholder: Describe goods in detail: names, models, materials, intended use...

div.label: HS Codes الأرمزة الجمركية
div.span: Separate codes with commas. Leave blank if unknown.

div.p: Tick all documents you have ready.

textarea.placeholder: Any other documents or special requirements...

div.p:
Our team will review your request within 1–2 business days.
A confirmation email has been sent to you.
Enter your reference number or token to check status

No request found for:
Please check your reference and try again.

t.t: Track My Requests — Customs Clearance Portal

div.p: Search by your name or phone number to see all your submitted requests and their current status.

div.h3: Search Your Requests / ابحث عن طلباتك

div.p: No requests found. Please check the name or phone number and try again.
